manifest.name: Tezcat

name: Tezcat

releases.author: mmargenot
releases.description: This release incorporates feedback from the Obsidian team, primarily improving compatibility with other plugins.
releases.name: Tezcat 1.1.0

releases.author: mmargenot
releases.description:
This is the first release for Tezcat, a plugin that adds AI indexing to your Obsidian vaults. This initial version primarily supports local large language model (LLM) usage via Ollama, but it also provides support for using OpenAI embeddings.

Use Tezcat to surface related fragments of information from around your vault while you are in the process of writing.
releases.name: Tezcat 1.0.0
